channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-9119] LNet Multi-Rail Dynamic Discovery preparation
item.description:
This ticket tracks the patches that will land in master that prepare for the dynamic discovery feature.

LU-9119 lnet: remove debug ioctl
LU-9119 lnet: Normalize ioctl interface
LU-9119 lnet: fix race in lnet shutdown path
LU-9119 socklnd: propagate errors on send failure
LU-9119 lnet: loopback NID in lnet_select_pathway()
LU-9119 lnet: rename LNET_MAX_INTERFACES
LU-9119 lnet: selftest MR fix
LU-9119 lnet: Fix deleting peers from YAML

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
"Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>" merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/55507/
Subject: LU-9119 lnet: remove "struct' from generated comment
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: 03dd4734a5999a34f8bf77a53f2d7a30fce75b61

"Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>" merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/55446/
Subject: LU-9119 lnet: whitespace cleanup for wirecheck.c
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: 755975e1c41531be8703462e7254fd7b1ba57533

"Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/55507
Subject: LU-9119 lnet: remove "struct' from generated comment
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: ced4e9d2f1a029bd807c372c631798702a1375ea

"Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/55446
Subject: LU-9119 lnet: whitespace cleanup for wirecheck.c
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 19b9639dc70b75b7b7596f088aae655706ec7599
All DD prep patches have landed. This ticket can be closed as the DD feature itself will be tracked in another ticket.
